web.title: Home | IMS Open Badges
web.description: Open Badges is the world's leading format for digital badges. Open Badges is not a specific product or platform, but a type of digital badge that is verifiable.

web.title: Open Badges - 1EdTech
web.description: 1EdTech's Open Badges specification describes a method for packaging information about a single recognition or achievement.

web.title: Open Badges | www.opengroup.org
web.description: What Are Open Badges? Open Badges are portable, verifiable digital credentials that represent an individual's skills, achievements, or certifications.
